codeReview.summary: The implementation stays narrowly scoped to the flaky file-index spec and addresses the reproduced race by waiting for listener registration, request-id capture, and cleanup registration before emitting the synthetic completion event. That matches the feature intent of stabilizing the recurring full-suite timeout gate without changing product code, and the paired save-reload suite was revalidated unchanged in the worker evidence.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, commit f8ba6ef, and shared-state docs. The change correctly hardens the async test orchestration in src/lib/core/services/file-index.test.ts so the prior full-suite race no longer depends on immediate listener setup, and I found no blocking or non-blocking issues within this feature scope.
